title: DAIMON Robotics Wants to Give Robot Hands a Sense of Touch
title_zh: DAIMON Robotics Wants to Give Robot Hands a Sense of Touch
abstract: This article is brought to you by  DAIMON Robotics .   This April, Hong Kong-based  DAIMON Robotics  has released  Daimon-Infinity , which it describes as the largest omni-modal robotic dataset for physical AI, featuring high resolution tactile sensing and spanning a wide range of tasks from folding laundry at home to manufacturing on factory assembly lines. The project is supported by collaborati
